titleStmt.title: SII 17.715: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 715. (A.R. No. 658 of 1904.) RĀMAGIRI, TIRUVALLUR TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the east wall of the Bhairava shrine in the Vālīśvara temple.

This inscription records the gift of 32 cows, left in the hands of the śivabrāhmaṇas (names specified) of the temple by Niṉṟai-kuḷattuḻāṉ Tiruvaṉ Peṟṟāṉ alias Niṉṟaiyūr-nāṭṭu-vēḷāṉ for burning a perpetual lamp in the temple of Tirukkārikarai-piḷḷaiyār situated in Niṉṟaiyūr-nāḍu, a sub-division of Kuṉṟavattaṉa-kōṭṭam, a division of Jayaṅgoṇḍaśōḻa-maṇḍalam.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ ciriirājairājatevaṟku yāṇṭu pattāvatu ceyaṅ koṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu kuṉṟavattaṉak koṭṭattu niṉṟaiyūr nāṭṭu nāyanār tirukkārikarai piḷḷaiyāṟkku niṉṟaik kuḷattuḻāṉ tiruvaṉ peṟṟāṉ niṉṟaiyūr nāṭṭu veḷāṉ Ippiḷḷaiyā
rkku vaitta tirununtāviḷakku Oṉṟukku viṭṭa pacu muppattiraṇṭu Ikkoyiṟ civap pirāmaṇaṉ Āṇṭāṉ paṭṭaṉum Aṉpanāyakapaṭṭaṉum Āṭkoṇṭa piḷḷaiyum Ivaṉ tampi nāyakapiḷḷaiyum pūcāripaṭṭaṉum Ivan tampi kārippiḷḷaiyum Ippacu muppat tiraṇṭu tirununtāviḷakku
paiyamākak kaikkoṇṭu cantirātittavarai ErikkaSpace left unengraved.kaṭavo kkoṇṭom Ivvaṉaivom .
Digital edition of SII 17.715 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
